title: Baliuag Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baliuag with a Z-Score of +4.97. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Baliuag is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 16.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, and the wind speed is 4.2 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The lack of precipitation and high temperatures are exacerbating the situation, with a Heating Degree Day (HDD) value of 0.0 GG, indicating no heating required.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
